programme.title: Wildest Africa: Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice
programme.desc: Mount Kenya soars over 5km into the air. It is the second highest mountain in Africa. At its summit, temperatures fluctuate from over 30 degrees celsius to below freezing.
programme.sub-title: Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Congo: the Untamed Heart
programme.desc: Known for centuries as Africa's Dark Heart, the Congo is a multi-layered, three-dimensional world, seething with innumerable species. By peeling back the layers, we discover how this vast rainforest works, and expose the hidden lives of its inhabitants.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Cape Coast: Where Worlds Colide
programme.desc: Watch Africa's Cape Coast that goes from the frigid waters of Cape Point to the sub-tropic seas of Kwazulu-Natal.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Sahara: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: Watch Africa's Cape Coast that goes from the frigid waters of Cape Point to the sub-tropic seas of Kwazulu-Natal./After, see Africa's Dark Heart in the Congo which is seething with innumerable species./Last,learn about the largest desert in the world.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Congo: the Untamed Heart
programme.desc: Known for centuries as Africa's Dark Heart, the Congo is a multi-layered, three-dimensional world, seething with innumerable species. By peeling back the layers, we discover how this vast rainforest works, and expose the hidden lives of its inhabitants.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile
programme.desc: The largest of Africa's Rift valley lakes, Lake Turkana is at the heart of one of the harshest landscapes on the planet. Despite its hostile environment, man and beast have both worked out a way to survive.
programme.sub-title: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Sahara: Life on the Edge

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ethiopia: Land of Extremes
programme.desc: Landlocked and surrounded by five countries, Ethiopia is one of east Africa's forgotten lands. Seemingly passive deserts in fact seethe with fire, and cloud-piercing peaks shield a secret Eden of canyons and cliff-tops teeming with life.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile
programme.desc: The largest of Africa's Rift valley lakes, Lake Turkana is at the heart of one of the harshest landscapes on the planet. Despite its hostile environment, man and beast have both worked out a way to survive.
programme.sub-title: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ethiopia: Land of Extremes
programme.desc: Landlocked and surrounded by five countries, Ethiopia is one of east Africa's forgotten lands. Seemingly passive deserts in fact seethe with fire, and cloud-piercing peaks shield a secret Eden of canyons and cliff-tops teeming with life.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.
programme.sub-title: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds, its forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the mighty river: the Orinoco, the rumoured route to El Dorado, city of gold.
programme.sub-title: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth

programme.sub-title: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds, its forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the mighty river: the Orinoco, the rumoured route to El Dorado, city of gold.
programme.sub-title: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado

programme.title: From Time To Time
programme.desc: In 1940s England, Tolly is sent to the country house of his grandmother whilst his mother searches for his missing father. Tolly soon finds that he can pass through time and becomes caught up in the family mysteries that still echo in his own time...

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Why Did I Get Married?
programme.desc: A dramedy about the knots we tie. WHY DID I GET MARRIED is the big-screen adaptation of Perry's stage play about the trials and tribulations of marriage, and what happens when a group of couples reunites and secrets are uncovered.

programme.title: Where Hands Touch
programme.desc: In 1944, a 15-year-old girl, daughter of a white German mother and a black African father, meets a member of the Hitler Youth. They become bound by the realisation of the horrors being committed around them.

programme.title: Love Potion #9
programme.desc: Paul, a geek biochemist with no luck at all with women, is persuaded by his friends to visit a gypsy. She gives him "Love Potion #9", an elixir which can potentially force anyone of the opposite sex to instantly fall in love with him.

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: One Last Dance
programme.desc: In the wake of tragedy, a renowned NY dance company is on the brink of collapse. After leaving the dance world for good, Travis, Chrissa and Max have one last chance to re-connect with the passion and prove that miracles really can happen.

programme.title: Black or White
programme.desc: A heart-wrenching drama starring Academy Award Winners Octavia Spencer and Kevin Costner. When Elliot is left to care for his granddaughter Eloise by himself, Eloise’s paternal grandmother seeks custody, drawing them into a long and uncertain battle.

programme.title: What's Eating Gilbert Grape
programme.desc: Gilbert feels trapped - with no father present and an eccentric family to care for, he is struggling to cope. Despite the hardships Gilbert perseveres, but will he be able to live his own life?

programme.title: Nobel Son
programme.desc: On the eve of Barkley Michaelson's father receiving the Nobel Prize, Barkley is kidnapped and the requested ransom is the $2,000,000 in Nobel Prize money.

programme.title: Bride of the Monster
programme.desc: Horror cinema icons Bela Lugosi and Tor Johnson star in this Ed Wood classic as the crazed Dr. Vornoff and his beastly assistant Lobo.

programme.title: Lost Continent
programme.desc: A military team sent to search for a lost rocket ends up trapped on a mountain inhabited by dinosaurs in Lost Continent.

programme.title: Swamp Diamonds
programme.desc: An undercover police woman infiltrates a group of hardened female criminals who plan to break out of prison and retrieve diamonds from a swamp.

programme.title: The Black Scorpion
programme.desc: Giant scorpions rise out of a volcano and attack Mexico in The Black Scorpion.

programme.title: Red Zone Cuba
programme.desc: An escaped convict and his two pals take part in the Bay of Pigs invasion, then return home with a plan to get rich.

programme.title: Jungle Goddess
programme.desc: Jungle Goddess: An heiress stranded in Africa is made queen of the jungle in the feature film and Bela Lugosi stars in the short The Phantom Creeps.

programme.title: The Brute Man
programme.desc: Rondo Hatton plays a disfigured man, a/k/a “The Creeper,” who hunts down and kills the people responsible for his deformity.

programme.title: Indestructible Man
programme.desc: In Indestructible Man, a violent criminal named Butcher Benson is executed and becomes indestructible when he’s brought back to life. Butcher seeks revenge against those who caused his execution.

programme.title: The Unearthly
programme.desc: A mad scientist creates havoc when an experiment to stop the aging process goes awry.

programme.title: Racket Girls
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon (played by Neil Connery, brother of Sean), the brother of a secret agent, combats villain Thair Beta.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 229
programme.desc: Could someone shoot a live grenade in mid-air, thus rendering it useless? Can you contain a TNT explosion inside an ordinary object?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 147
programme.desc: Can you escape an explosive shockwave by diving in water? Can you make a car bulletproof using nothing but phone books?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 111
programme.desc: Were some of the photos from the moon landing fake? Can you bounce a laser off the moon? Was the film from the moon faked and just slowed down?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 129
programme.desc: Is pykrete tougher than ice, bulletproof and durable enough to make a boat out of? Can a V-shaped snowplough really split a car in two?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 26
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can too many bug bombs blow up a house? How hard is it to find a needle in a haystack? Will talking to plants help them grow?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 141
programme.desc: Can a person jump from a rooftop into a dumpster and walk away? Can a deep-sea diver's body be crushed into his helmet if his air hose breaks?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 158
programme.desc: Did the Greeks create an arrow machine gun that offered the speed, distance and precision that modern machine guns do? Is driving while tired worse than driving while tipsy?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 156
programme.desc: Are the Storm Chasers' vehicles fit to withstand force 5 tornado speeds? Is it possible to build a personal tornado protection device?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 71
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is it possible to survive a 22,000-foot fall using the blast from a 1,000-pound bomb to break the fall? Is electricity saved by switching off the lights when leaving a room?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 178
programme.desc: Can a swimmer increase his chances of surviving an underwater explosion by floating at the surface? Did armies in ancient China use paper armor that was as effective as steel?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 49
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a football fly farther if it is filled with helium? Is it possible for a human to catch a bullet in his teeth?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 192
programme.desc: Can the swinging-cage rescue in "Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest" really be done? Can an oil drum filled with methanol work as a high speed go kart?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 45
programme.desc: Myths tested: Do steel toe boots really put toes in more danger than a regular boot, to the extent that the steel toe would chop off the toes? Can bottle rockets be used to launch a human?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 102
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is it possible to use a rowboat as a submarine? Can one escape if buried in the sand? What kind of projectiles would pirates use in a cannon if they run out of cannonballs?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 52
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a bullet fired straight up in the air kill someone on the way back down? If low-end vodka is charcoal-filtered, will it become a top-shelf vodka?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 18
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a scuba diver be sucked up in a firefighting helicopter? Are various car myths from movies true?

programme.title: MythBusters: Buster Special
programme.desc: This special episode pays homage to Buster the Crash Test Dummy. Without him, either dozens of myths would have gone untested or Jamie and Adam would constantly be at the local hospital.

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Flatbed To Flatbed, Worm Coffin, The Tumbler
programme.desc: In one stunt from this episode, a contestant lies in a coffin in the ground as night crawlers wiggle over their entire body.
programme.sub-title: A Flatbed To Flatbed, Worm Coffin, The Tumbler

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Dual Box Drop, Milk The Goat, Helicopter Box Escape
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed in a plexiglass box. Contestants race two at a time to see who can be fastest to suck a goat udder. Contestant will be placed standing in a box that is 3 feet wide, 7 feet high and 2 feet deep.
programme.sub-title: A Dual Box Drop, Milk The Goat, Helicopter Box Escape

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Phantom Swing On Freemont Street, Slot Eye Ball, The Luxor Slide
programme.desc: A contestant plays a custom-made slot machine to determine which type of cooked eye pairs they will have to eat. In another stunt, contestants will climb out on the 29th floor window at the Luxor Hotel in Las Vegas.
programme.sub-title: A Phantom Swing On Freemont Street, Slot Eye Ball, The Luxor Slide

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Dual Helicopter Drop, Pot Lock Dinner, Tank Of Dead Mice, Pit Fall
programme.desc: A contestant must enter a cylindrical glass tank filled with water, where dead, frozen mice are then dumped in. Other contestants face disgusting food and more horrors in this episode of Fear Factor.
programme.sub-title: A Dual Helicopter Drop, Pot Lock Dinner, Tank Of Dead Mice, Pit Fall

programme.title: Fear Factor: Extreme Monkey Bars, Leech Coffin, Ham and Eggs Fear Factor Style, Platform Swing, Swim With Chum, Quad Lunch
programme.desc: Contestants hold onto monkey bars, suspended under a helicopter. Contestants search for rubber boots at the bottom of a tank of cut up fish parts. Contestants must run their motorcycles off of a cliff.
programme.sub-title: Extreme Monkey Bars, Leech Coffin, Ham and Eggs Fear Factor Style, Platform Swing, Swim With Chum, Quad Lunch

programme.title: Fear Factor: Semi Circle Flag Snag, Feeding Frenzy With Piranhas, Roulette Spider Eating
programme.desc: A tank is filled with Piranha and pig kidneys, which need to be picked up off using contestants' mouths.
programme.sub-title: Semi Circle Flag Snag, Feeding Frenzy With Piranhas, Roulette Spider Eating

programme.title: Fear Factor: Taxi To Taxi Jump, Roach Coffin, Crain Money Grab, BlackJack Bet
programme.desc: Taxi cabs will be suspended from cranes. A player is placed inside a sealed coffin with thousands of roaches. The contestants will be hung by their ankles from a crane and suspended over a swimming pool.
programme.sub-title: Taxi To Taxi Jump, Roach Coffin, Crain Money Grab, BlackJack Bet

programme.title: Fear Factor: Heli Crawl and Flag Grab, Maggot Madness, Head on Pipe Ramp
programme.desc: Players must transfer cow hooves out of a tank of cod liver oil and into a tank of maggots. A contestant must drive their car at approx. 25mph towards another car in another terrifying stunt.
programme.sub-title: Heli Crawl and Flag Grab, Maggot Madness, Head on Pipe Ramp

programme.title: Fear Factor: Heli Water Drag, Cow Eye Juice, Truck-To-Truck Transfer
programme.desc: Contestants will start this game floating in the water. Contestants compress a cows eye with their mouth, squeezing the juice out of the eye into a glass. Contestant will stand on Euclid dump trucks as they travel down the road.
programme.sub-title: Heli Water Drag, Cow Eye Juice, Truck-To-Truck Transfer

programme.title: Fear Factor: Heli Dunk,Conveyor Belt,Human Hamster Wheel
programme.desc: Helicopter picks up contestant by their ankles then dunks them. Contestants transfer a bunch of Fear Factor items off of a moving conveyer belt and onto a scale. Contestants will stand inside a giant ring above water.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Submerged Bus,Dirty Kitchen,Brain Surgery,Falling Beam Walk
programme.desc: A Contestant must dive into the water and swim down to a submerged city bus. Players are given fifty cow brains with a FF chip hidden inside, and must make the way across a maze of beams in another stunt.
programme.sub-title: Submerged Bus,Dirty Kitchen,Brain Surgery,Falling Beam Walk

programme.title: Fear Factor: Water Sack, Beetle, Roach, Worm Transfer
programme.desc: The contestant is placed in a specially designed clear bag. A tank is filled with millipedes, roaches and worms. Contestant is standing on one of four 8-foot tall 16-foot long Plexiglas walls suspended high above the ground.
programme.sub-title: Water Sack, Beetle, Roach, Worm Transfer

programme.title: Fear Factor: Truck To Helicopter,Table Clearing,Under The Semi
programme.desc: Players will have to clear tables to uncover a three-digit combination written on the glass top and drive a car under a semi truck.
programme.sub-title: Truck To Helicopter,Table Clearing,Under The Semi

programme.title: Fear Factor: Boat Raft Leap Frog,Family Tunnel,Worm Head,Suspended Water Tube
programme.desc: There will be a boat that is towing three rafts. A Plexiglas bottom covered in pig parts. The child stands under a large metal shower-head and pulls a chain. Suspended above the water. The kid must climb through the tubes and traverse.
programme.sub-title: Boat Raft Leap Frog,Family Tunnel,Worm Head,Suspended Water Tube

programme.title: Fear Factor: Boat To Boat Transfer,Worm Wine,Matrix Truck Straddle
programme.desc: Contestants must leap back and forth between boats collecting as many flags as possible as well as spend time in a grape-stomping vat in this episode.
programme.sub-title: Boat To Boat Transfer,Worm Wine,Matrix Truck Straddle

programme.title: Fear Factor: Cable Surfing, Gift Exchange, Lake O'Fire
programme.desc: A contestant must slide down two cables while standing on a small platform and swim underneath a 20 foot by 40-foot grid on fire. One at a time, contestants pick nasty gifts from under a Christmas tree in this festive episode.
programme.sub-title: Cable Surfing, Gift Exchange, Lake O'Fire

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Cold Start
programme.desc: Mikey links up with Chris Hadfield aboard the International Space Station. Problems mount while trying to get a frozen DC-4 airborne. A landing gear collapse on the runway sends the entire crew scrambling.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot David faces a remote Arctic airstrip with sketchy landing gear. Mikey drafts a Buffalo hockey team to face off against an NHL squad in a charity shootout. Chuck gets a chance to shine on the ice.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Snowplane
programme.desc: Joe races a quirky antique snowmobile - with an airplane engine and no brakes. The water bomber crew struggles to get two planes out of Turkey. Cocky rampie Chris Staples tries to prove himself in the C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Gear Lock
programme.desc: A cold snap triggers massive challenges. Devan runs into gear problems while he ferries a mothballed DC-3 across the country. And Justin has to make a snap decision with his newborn son aboard his plane.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Aussie Ace
programme.desc: The Electra returns from repairs and the crew takes it right back to the ice strip that it set off from before the crash landing last year. Tyler works up the courage to confront Joe about a big decision. A hotshot Australian pilot tries to earn a job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Rock Stars and Rampies
programme.desc: Facing Joe's wrath, Rod and Cory head to the UK to make urgent water bomber repairs. David tries to prove himself to Devan in the C-46 but ends up infuriating Devan. Will makes an ultimatum in Hay River.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Camp
programme.desc: Mikey trains for High Arctic survival with the Canadian Rangers. The Air Force invades Chuck's hangar. Joe faces tough competition at a California plane auction.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Frozen Solid
programme.desc: AJ and James battle a DC-4 engine fire. It's Joe's 69th birthday - and he's never flown a helicopter before, so Mikey plans a special gift of chopper flight lessons.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Power Crash
programme.desc: Cory, Chuck and Brian watch as a 5,000-pound power unit smash to the ground, denting the Electra and putting it out of commission. Mikey scrambles to manage the crisis while Joe races to England to try and purchase a backup Electra.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Breakdown
programme.desc: Co-pilot Graeme's fumbles his Electra training landings. Chris stresses over his C-46 check ride. Adam rescues a stranded C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Target Practice
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head to England to bring home a new plane. Devan does target-practice in the DC-4.James builds a Buffalo-style soapbox racer.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Air Show
programme.desc: Joe flies with the Snowbirds during the Hamilton air show and later teaches Mikey to fly. A surprise departure shakes up Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Five Seasons
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWT celebrates a milestone with a look back at the last five years, a peek behind the camera and reflections from the Buffalo crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: A Ball O'Snags
programme.desc: An engine fire and series of mechanical gremlins has Buffalo scrambling to make its Christmas deliveries. Newest rampie Prefkar Mony struggles with life in the North.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Storm
programme.desc: Buffalo's Electra aircraft is hammered by rough winds up the Mackenzie Valley. In Hay River, a rookie crew faces the worst ice storm in years and one rampie has a tough go trying to fit in at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Old Dogs
programme.desc: Engine trouble plagues Buffalo's newest Electra, ZFE, and a standoff between Joe and Transport Canada threatens to close the airline. At the same time, Joe faces a tough decision about his old dog Sophie.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Checkflight
programme.desc: Joe leaves to undergo medical tests at the Mayo Clinic in Phoenix, Arizona. Jeff and Sam stress over their DC-3 checkflights and Joe celebrates turning 70-his way.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Second Chances
programme.desc: Rookie pilot Jeff nearly runs off the runway. Prefkar learns to play hockey but drops the ball at Buffalo and Joe goes on a date with a real dog.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Big Plans, Bad Luck
programme.desc: Mikey decides to get Buffalo involved in a D-Day paratrooper jump to commemorate the 70th anniversary of D-Day. Prefkar escapes Hay River courier duty. Cory finds an original bracket for the DC3 static line for Mikey's D-Day jump.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Dogfight
programme.desc: Buffalo's top guns, rookies and vets, go to California for aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. Cory and Mikey race to get ready for the D-Day jump.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Diagnosis: Deletion
programme.desc: Blue Angel’s looking to Speed Duel her way to victory, but the diabolical doctor she’s battling is set on prescribing a dose of defeat!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Brave Battler
programme.desc: With LINK VRAINS under attack, it’s up to the flashiest duelist ever to save the day – Shima!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Bugging Out
programme.desc: The fate of LINK VRAINS hangs in the balance as Playmaker faces off against one of Hanoi’s top lieutenants!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Kolter’s Khronicles
programme.desc: The Hanoi have expanded their reach beyond the boundaries of LINK VRAINS, and Kolter’s chronicling the chaos!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Under VRAINS
programme.desc: Ghost Gal ventures into the vast underbelly of LINK VRAINS and uncovers a sinister secret the Hanoi have been hiding!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Showdown in the Sewers
programme.desc: Ghost Gal puts her data on the line when she Speed Duels against Varis in the sewers of LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Tower of Hanoi
programme.desc: The Hanoi’s greatest weapon is about to be unleashed unless Yusaku can link into the VRAINS and stop it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Once Upon A Time
programme.desc: As Blue Angel's biggest fan, Spectre knows all her dueling tricks and techniques - which makes him the fiercest foe she's ever faced!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Roots of Evil
programme.desc: Spectre knows Blue Angel's entire life story, and he’s going to give it a sad ending!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Hollow
programme.desc: Playmaker must cut down Spectre’s defenses if he is to topple the Tower of Hanoi!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: A Bridge Too Far
programme.desc: Spectre stoops to a new low when he reveals a game changer that leaves Playmaker without a play to make!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: The duel between Playmaker and Spectre comes to a crashing conclusion as the bridge they’re battling on begins to break apart!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Looking Back
programme.desc: Varis reflects on the past as he prepares for a future without LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Ring the Bell
programme.desc: Gore grapples with Varis as he looks to drop the hammer on the Hanoi!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Gore at War
programme.desc: Making a comeback is what Gore does best, but will his finisher be enough to vanquish Varis?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Truth and Consequences
programme.desc: Playmaker makes a final stand against Varis to save LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Storm Access
programme.desc: Playmaker’s life points are on the verge of elimination - along with any hopes of stopping Varis and the Tower of Hanoi!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Reveal
programme.desc: Varis reveals his true identity – as well as the terrifying truth behind the Ignis!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Illusion of Hope
programme.desc: Time’s running out as Playmaker has less than one hour before all of LINK VRAINS is destroyed!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Standing Tall
programme.desc: The Tower of Hanoi is nearly complete – leaving Varis a win away from deleting LINK VRAINS once and for all!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Link to the Future
programme.desc: Varis is on the verge of victory unless Playmaker can make one last play to stop him!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: On Your Mark, Get Set, DUEL!
programme.desc: Hoping to save his friends from the clutches of Sector Security, Yusei Fudo challenges his old nemesis Officer Trudge to a Turbo Duel!
programme.sub-title: On Your Mark, Get Set, DUEL!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Creepy Crawlies
programme.desc: With his Duel Runner on the line, Yusei finds himself dueling against a bully who battles with a deck full of bugs.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Looking to get his Stardust Dragon card back from Jack Atlas, Yusei takes off in a race against time and Sector Security.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Blast from the Past, Part 1
programme.desc: After making it through to New Domino City, Yusei confronts his old friend Jack Atlas and challenges him to a Turbo Duel.
programme.sub-title: A Blast from the Past, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Blast from the Past, Part 2
programme.desc: As the clash between Jack and Yusei comes to a climatic close, a mysterious creature appears as their two Dragons duke it out.
programme.sub-title: A Blast from the Past, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Facility, Part 1
programme.desc: After being sent to The Facility, Yusei befriends an odd old man who duels with a treasure deck full of ancient mystic cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Facility, Part 2
programme.desc: Yusei duels the top dog at The Facility using Yanagi's treasure deck. Meanwhile, Jack learns about the mystery surrounding his Mark of the Crimson Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Fire It Up!
programme.desc: With Yusei still serving out his sentence at The Facility, Jack finds himself having to face off against former Turbo Duel Champion Hunter Pace in a rematch that could send Jack's career up in smoke.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Lockdown Duel, Part 1
programme.desc: After being sent to the Maximum Security Zone in The Facility, Yusei risks being permanently placed in lockdown when he decides to duel Chief Armstrong in order to win a pardon for his pal.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Lockdown Duel, Part 2
programme.desc: As the clash between Yusei and the Chief comes to a shocking conclusion, Yusei must figure out a way to win the battle before his life points get zapped to zero.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Take Back, Part 1
programme.desc: After being freed from the Facility, Yusei risks being re-incarcerated when he tries to take back his Duel Runner from Sector Security's vault.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Take Back, Part 2
programme.desc: With Officer Trudge in hot pursuit, Yusei looks to rev his game up before the long arm of the law grabs a hold of him for good!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Duel to Remember
programme.desc: When Yusei can't remember his own name, he agrees to duel a pint-sized player named Leo in the hopes of getting his memory back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Bloom of the Black Rose
programme.desc: As Leo and his pal Dexter venture into the narrows of New Domino City to find the mysterious duelist known as the Black Rose, Blister breaks out a plan to keep Yusei's friends in the Satellite Sector safe from Goodwin's goons.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Welcome to the Fortune Cup
programme.desc: The stage is set for the Fortune Cup as eight elite duelists vie for the chance to take on reigning champion Jack Atlas. However, for the Master of Ceremonies Rex Goodwin, it's not about who wins or loses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Battle With the Black Rose
programme.desc: The second duel of the Fortune Cup is about to get under way as the mysterious duelist known as the Black Rose finds herself having to face off against a medieval menace named Sir Randsborg.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Surprise, Surprise!
programme.desc: With the first Turbo Duel of the Fortune Cup set to start, a surprise guest forces Yusei's competition to take an unexpected pit stop.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Return to the Spirit World, Part 1
programme.desc: Director Goodwin enlists the hypnotic powers of the Professor to expose Luna as a Signer and uncover the secrets she unknowingly knows of the Duel Monsters Spirit World.
programme.sub-title: Return to the Spirit World, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Return to the Spirit World, Part 2
programme.desc: As the battle between the Professor and Luna continues, Luna looks to keep a promise she made to protect the Duel Monsters Spirit World, but in order for her to succeed, she must first break free of the hypnotic hold the Professor has on her.
programme.sub-title: Return to the Spirit World, Part 2

programme.title: National Lampoon's Gold Diggers
programme.desc: A pair of losers marry two elderly sisters, thinking they'll inherit their fortune and Beverly Hills estate.

programme.title: You May Not Kiss the Bride
programme.desc: Bryan is a quiet, photographer but when he falls foul of local gangsters, he is forced to marry the boss's daughter, Masha, in order for her to get her green card. They are sent to a remote tropical island for a honeymoon that is far from idyllic.

programme.title: The Steal
programme.desc: When villainous London bankers plunder desperately-needed money from the Third World, a female computer hacker is hired to get it back. A tale of kidnapping, computer fraud and Morris Minors.

programme.title: No Men Beyond This Point
programme.desc: Imagine a world where, since 1953, women have been able to reproduce without men and they are no longer giving birth to male babies. Now, over 60 years later, this deadpan mockumentary follows the youngest man still alive – 37 years-old Andrew Myers.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is just your average, undercover super-assassin. When he meets Jen, he finds true love. But a picture-perfect marriage won't save Spencer from becoming a target himself. Now Spencer and Jen are on the run for their lives.

programme.title: 30 Days until I'm Famous
programme.desc: A Latina working in Los Angeles as a messenger is randomly discovered and fashioned into a pop music star.

programme.title: Accidentally Engaged
programme.desc: Famous actor Chas Hunter and aspiring actress Clarissa Byers agree to fake an engagement to improve both their reputations. However, playing pretend starts to feel all too real as the two start to fall for one another.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Gold Diggers
programme.desc: A pair of losers marry two elderly sisters, thinking they'll inherit their fortune and Beverly Hills estate.

programme.title: 10 Years
programme.desc: 10 Years follows a group of friends on their high school reunion. Among them is Jake (Channing Tatum) who is deeply in love with his girlfriend and ready to propose until he runs into his high school flame (Rosario Dawson).

programme.title: Blackball
programme.desc: In the world of spectator sports, there are of course the all time greats: football, rugby, tennis, golf and... lawn bowls? Try as he might, Cliff Starkey (Paul Kaye) just can't keep out of trouble.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stockport to investigate a haunted mill, which has a lift with a mind all of its own. Will any of the ghosts haunting the mill join him on the investigation tonight or will it all go pear shaped?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the mill and is attacked by a spirit. Jane joins the investigation with surprising results. Will it have a happy ending?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Forgotten Souls of Errwood Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to the Errwood Hall ruins in the Goyt Valley. It is said to be haunted by 3 spirits, and that it has its very own time slip. The investigation does not disappoint and although the hall is gone, the spirits remain.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean enters one of the UK's most haunted escape rooms and it appears that he is not the only one trying to escape. Will the spirits play games with him tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 2
programme.desc: The investigation continues at the escape room and a certain spirit attempts to tug at Sean's clothing. Will he finally survive the escape room?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lock Keepers Haunting at Lock 91
programme.desc: Sean heads to Manchester to investigate a lock keeper's cottage that was built in 1804. It appears that the spirits are still watching over the building and terrifying its customers.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Leeds and investigates Abbey House Museum among a maze of Victorian streets and shops. Who will he bump into tonight and what secrets does this location hold?
programme.sub-title: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at Abbey House Museum and ventures outside into the monastery ruins. Will he find the ghostly monk tonight?
programme.sub-title: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Evil Cook at The Shakespeare Pub
programme.desc: Sean explores The Shakespeare pub in Manchester and meets Flecky Bennett to investigate claims dating back hundreds of years, about an evil chef that is haunting the pub.
programme.sub-title: The Evil Cook at The Shakespeare Pub

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Strange Things at Owd Betts
programme.desc: Sean heads to Rochdale and investigates strange paranormal reports at Owd Betts. Something spooky lurks in the basement and it seems Sean is not alone as he investigates the main bar.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Dimensional Gateway of The Nine Ladies Stone Circle
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stanton Moor, Derbyshire and encounters a portal to the spirit dimension within a mystical stone circle, used for witchcraft and occult practices. With no outside interference, the activity is off the scale.
programme.sub-title: Dimensional Gateway of The Nine Ladies Stone Circle

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Mischievous Ghost of The Kings Arms Hotel
programme.desc: Sean investigates claims that a mischievous ghost going by the name of Alice is causing havoc at The Kings Arms Hotel. This is one night at a hotel that the team will not rest.
programme.sub-title: The Mischievous Ghost of The Kings Arms Hotel

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Dangerous Demon of The Stork Inn
programme.desc: Sean heads to Wigan to investigate a location with history dating back to 900AD. Encountering a spirit that attacks him, will the team be safe tonight as they come face to face with pure evil?
programme.sub-title: Dangerous Demon of The Stork Inn

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Buried under the location Sean investigates tonight, is the bones of the deceased and it appears that they are at unrest. Will Sean solve the mystery of who is haunting this location?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Not a Very Fun Day at The Beech Caves
programme.desc: Witchcraft, demons and ghosts have all been reported to haunt these caves. Sean investigates this network of tunnels deep underground and uncovers that all is not as it seems. This is not a day out at the seaside at Beech Caves.
programme.sub-title: Not a Very Fun Day at The Beech Caves

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghosts of Bolton Sea Cadets
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team heads to Bolton to check out the alleged haunting at Sea Cadets academy.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunted Weir Mill
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team visits Weir Mill, the oldest and most paranormally active mill in Stockport.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to Derbyshire to investigate the New Mills Arts Theatre. This quirky little building has played host to many famous acts and world-renowned plays but has a little-known secret in that it's allegedly haunted.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 2
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team is ready for act II at the New Mills Arts Theatre. With so much apparent activity happening at this unassuming theatre, the team just couldn't leave when so much more could happen.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 2

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 20
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin travel to Cornwall to see a hotel; will it be faulty towers all over again or a huge money maker? A three bedroom house in Nottingham in a reasonable location; but needs abit of TLC. In Kent a piece of land right on the sea front.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin see a vandalised property that needs a lot of work in Edgware. Instead of a property being auctioned; it's 29 acres of land attached to a beautiful farm in Somerset; and in Stoke-on-Trent there's a terrace with a fair bit of potential.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 19
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a semi detached property in Nottingham, a retail unit in Kent with a lot to offer and a two bedroomed bungalow in Exmouth.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 4
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a beautiful cottage in Cornwall, a well-located house in Bermondsey and a plot of land in Leeds.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit a house in Derby, a pump house in Oxfordshire and a cottage in Plymouth.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 23
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a mid terrace in Devon, a house of two halves in Swindon and a lot of flat for very little cash in Sleby Yorkshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 24
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a three bedroom semi detached house near Bradford with a run down kitchen, a flat in London with big potential and a bungalow in Dorset with a room with a view.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 4
programme.desc: Lucy & Martin visit a flat in Willesden with 1930s features which overlooks Gladstone Park, a cottage in Enfield which had been in the same family since 1907 and in Plymouth, Devon a former student accommodation which needs to be returned to a good state.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 3
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a three bedroom detached house in Stafford that is perfect for a DIY enthusiast, a flat in Camden with a few cracks and a grade two listed property in Cornwall.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 14
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a property in Exeter where not everything is as it seems, a flat in London and a semi detached property in Derby with a large garden.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 9
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin see an end of terrace in Ilkeston near Derby; a plot of land with planning consent in industrial Leyton in East London; and in the Wiltshire village of Atworth a tiny cottage with low ceilings, a wild garden and plenty of little secrets.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a semi in County Durham, a garage in Devon and a 1930s flat in South London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 23
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a 14 bedroom former care home in Plymouth, a two bedroom split level flat in Peckham and a three bedroom end of terrace house in Liverpool, with a rather interesting feature. We see who buys them as they go Under The Hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view houses in Cardiff, Redding and Derby.

programme.title: Jabberwocky
programme.desc: A young peasant, with no interest in adventure or fortune, is mistaken as the kingdom's only hope when a horrible monster threatens the countryside.

programme.title: Death Watch
programme.desc: In a future where dying of illness is exceedingly rare, a terminally ill woman becomes a celebrity and a man with camera implants goes to secretly record her for a morbid TV show. (1980) Starring: Harvey Keitel, Romy Schneider, Harry Dean Stanton

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: Vampire Count Orlok expresses interest in a new residence and real estate agent Hutter's wife.

programme.title: Androcles And The Lion
programme.desc: Based on George Bernard Shaw's Roman satire about a Christian tailor's fortuitous friendship with a wild lion.

programme.title: Killing Dad
programme.desc: One of the all-time great British black comedies! A man goes looking for his long lost dad – only to meet a voracious older woman who is, apparently, the sex bomb of Southend.

programme.title: Mother Lode
programme.desc: A couple of adventurers go into the wilds of British Columbia in search of a lost colleague, but when their plane crashes they find themselves at the mercy of an isolated, crazy miner.

programme.title: Elvira's Haunted Hills
programme.desc: ELVIRA'S HAUNTED HILLS culls its outragousness from the classic Vincent Price/Roger Corman films of the early 60's along with a little Rocky Horror Picture Show and Fearless Vampire Killers.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A ruthless global cabal of financial investors plan to manipulate the price of gold by flooding one of South Africa’s top gold mines. Starring: Roger Moore, Susannah York, Ray Milland, Bradford Dillman, Bernard Horsfall, John Hussey

programme.title: The Addiction
programme.desc: A New York philosophy grad student turns into a vampire after getting bitten by one, and then tries to come to terms with her new lifestyle and frequent craving for human blood.

programme.title: Hunter: Night of the Dragons
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's investigation of a killing in Chinatown leads them to a Chinese gang leader being pursued by a police officer with a personal interest in the case.

programme.title: Hunter: Biggest Man in Town
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall go undercover at an exclusive resort to find a blackmailer's killer.

programme.title: Hunter: Rich Girl
programme.desc: When a millionaire is nearly killed, his wife is the primary heir and prime suspect -- until she's murdered. Hunter goes undercover to find the real killer.

programme.title: Hunter: Killer in a Halloween Mask
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall become involved in a string of bizarre murders when they're assigned as technical advisors for a television show.

programme.title: Hunter: Rape & Revenge - Part 1
programme.desc: When McCall is raped by a South American diplomat who's immune from prosecution, Hunter turns renegade and follows the man to his homeland.

programme.title: Hunter: Rape & Revenge - Part 2
programme.desc: Against departmental orders, Hunter goes to South America to stalk a diplomat who raped McCall.

programme.title: Hunter: Six Million Dollar Misunderstanding
programme.desc: A security guard-turned-thief loses the money he stole and searches for it with Hunter and McCall in close pursuit.

programme.title: Hunter: The Big Fall
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall realize they're attracted to each other as they protect an endangered witness who's set to testify before a grand jury.

programme.title: Hunter: Waiting for Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Hunter becomes involved with a beautiful model he suspects of complicity in a jewelry robbery.

programme.title: Hunter: Think Blue
programme.desc: Hunter helps a policeman who is framed for the murder of his wife.

programme.title: Hunter: Blow Up
programme.desc: Hunter is frustrated in his pursuit of a package bomber whose ruthless methods are being used to systematically kill the participants in the man's trial.

programme.title: Hunter: War Zone
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall work to stop a brigade of suburban mercenaries plotting to break a drug dealer out of prison.

programme.title: Hunter: Burned
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall are given 72 hours to find an attorney who falsified his death.

programme.title: Hunter: Scrap Metal
programme.desc: When a dying contract killer confesses he was once paid to kill Hunter's father, Hunter goes in pursuit of the true murderer.

programme.title: Hunter: Fagin 1986
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: 62 Hours of Terror
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: Death Machine
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: The Setup
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: The Beautiful & the Dead: Part 1
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford test drives the new Ford Fiesta; Vicki and Tiff are aided by renowned trainer Simon Pavey in a motorcycle race.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 14
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson learns the skills needed to drive in the Special Forces, from former Royal Marine sniper Aldo Kane.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 11
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson heads to the German HQ of the Dakar rally winning Mini X-Raid team, to experience the three toughest jobs in motorsport. She'll learn how to be a navigator, mechanic and driver before taking on Dakar rally legend Nani Roma

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell are joined by Ayrton Senna's nephew, Bruno Senna, to conduct their fastest ever track test. They hold a thrilling race between the brand new Porsche 911 Turbo S and two supercar rivals from Noble and Nissan.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jason Plato is in Iceland being taught how to race a brutal Formula Off-Road buggy up a cliff of volcanic rock by a former champion. Tiff Needell is joined by former Le Mans winner Guy Smith to test a brand new version of Bentley's best selling car

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of "Fifth Gear," Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out if the new 207 GTi is as exhilarating to drive as the 20-year-old hot hatch grandmaster, the 205GTi.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny conducts a shocking crash test to find out whether you are safer in the front of a car or in the back.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford performs the only televised test of the Dodge Challenger; Jonny Smith heads to the Ultimate Street Car show at Santa Pod to judge the "Show & Shine" competition.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Iwan Thomas accepts a stunt challenge from world-famous precision driver Russ Swift.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 12
programme.desc: Jonny Smith goes behind-the-scenes at America's biggest motor race, the Indy 500. He hears what makes the event so special from triple winner Dario Franchitti, reveals the technical differences between F1 cars and Indy cars

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato test two roadsters on the track; Tom Ford tests the sexy new Maserati GranTurismo coupe.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tiff Needell enters the opening round of the exclusive Lamborghini Super Trofeo race series – with advice from the man with every petrolhead's dream job – Lamborghini chief test driver Giorgio Sanna.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Jonny Smith battle the elements to find out if a caravan or a camper van is the ultimate way to experience the great outdoors. Elsewhere in the show, the team hit the local supermarket to find out about the new Dacia Duste

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 16
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is in Italy testing the most powerful Ferrari ever made, the brand new 730bhp F12berlinetta, to the limit. Tiff and Jason are at the track with the two cheapest hot hatches on sale – the Suzuki Swift and Renault Sport Twingo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Karun Chandhok test four bare essential sports cars to find out which is the ultimate way to get some track day thrills for around £50,000. The Fifth Gear team test Ford's latest hot hatch, the Fiesta ST.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jonny Smith goes behind the scenes at the gruelling Isle of Man TT motorbike race, and spends the day with TT hero and 19 times winner John McGuinness. Tiff Needell races around the infamous TT circuit in the brand new Subaru BRZ sports car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason compete in a quad bike race; Vicki tests the new Alfa Romeo Mito.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 9
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson enters the brutal world of professional truck racing. She drives a 1100bhp truck herself, before heading to the Nurburgring where she joins the pit crew of former champion, German Jochen Hahn.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato competes in the British Touring Car Championships; Tiff drives one of the fastest and rarest cars on the planet: the £1 million Pagani Zonda R.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki visits the Paris motorshow; Jonny rides shotgun in Europe's fastest street car; Jason teaches Comedy Dave from Radio 1 how to drive like a hero.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff talks to Formula legend David Coulthard about the awesome new Mercedes SLS AMG; Jason drives the Ferrari 599 GTO, which may be one of the greatest Ferraris ever produced.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim Shaw takes Renault to task for overcharging customers; Tiff runs a shootout between two coupes; Vicki spends a day with Formula One star Lewis Hamilton.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith tests the VW Passat CC vs. the Mercedes CLS; Jonny Smith becomes an ice cream man for the day to test out the newly revamped Citroen Berlingo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jonny devise some driving challenges to find out which of four new hot hatches is the best; Jason heads to the continent to test drive the new Audi TT-RS.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 2
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson and Tiff Needell pit what could be the greatest drivers' car of the century – the Toyota GT86 – against its tough rival from Renault Sport. Jonny Smith is in Spain to put Jaguar's brand new F-Type through its paces

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: In some cases, the transformation from everyday woman to brutal killer is activated by a man. A boyfriend or husband can become the focus of a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A rifle in a shopping mall, a syringe of potassium chloride and a syringe of insulin, each in the hands of a mentally disturbed woman, lead to the tragic end of many lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hearts of Stone
programme.desc: Deadly Women are not always the ones you expect. They are not the strangers lurking in the dark, they are a young mother, a supportive wife and a grandmother - all killers. Behind their loving masquerade lies a wake of family horror and pain.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organization: the Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Family Secrets
programme.desc: A woman and her infant son vanish. The husband is frantic. The clues are scarce, but hopes linger, even as the hours and days tick by without a word. Was she on the run, or the victim of foul play?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Under Fire
programme.desc: A series of armored car heists and bloody shoot-outs shocked law enforcement. The brutal violence of the crimes suggested a motive more complex than greed. When the robbers started targeting police, the FBI took charge.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Family Torn
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Global Pursuit
programme.desc: In Langley, Virginia, a terrorist fired into rush hour traffic. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political, targeting employees of the Central Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: We meet several individuals who claim they have the ability to transcend time and space and identify people, objects, and locations hidden from their view.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: End times prophecy experts discuss the possible identity of the antichrist and the timing of his emergence onto the world state.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.sub-title: Are We Running Out of Oil?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S. Pentagon. Researchers present evidence to suggest the attack was perpetrated by some rogue element inside the U.S. government.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Two victims of alleged electronic harassment and organized gang-stalking recount their horrible ordeals. Richard investigates possible theories as to who is behind this program and why.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the various conspiracy theories revolving around the tragic death of Diana, The People's Princess, in Paris in August 1997.
programme.sub-title: The Death of Princess Diana - Tragic Car Accident or Murder Most Foul?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Area 51
programme.desc: What's going on inside Area 51, America's most carefully guarded secret? The mysterious military base located 30 minutes north west of Las Vegas has been rumored to be involved in back engineering advanced alien technology recovered from UFO crash sites.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Is The Cure for Cancer Being Suppressed?
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims that the medical profession, drug companies, the food industry and government agencies are suppressing a cure for cancer.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1997, an extraordinary event occurred across the state of Arizona that has become the subject of great debate in the UFO community.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.
programme.sub-title: Journey to the Center of the Earth

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A lawyer and from the Pacific Northwest claims to have been part of a secret government time travel experiment, known as Project Pegasus.

programme.desc: Is it conceivable that the Doors legendary front man did not die in a bathtub in Paris of an apparent drug overdose?
programme.sub-title: Did Jim Morrison Fake His Death?

programme.sub-title: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)

programme.desc: Richard examines the growing UFO Disclosure movement and its attempts to force the US Government to reveal to the public what it knows about UFOs and aliens.

programme.desc: Richard investigates claims crop plants created for human or animal consumption using the latest molecular biology techniques are unsafe.

programme.desc: Did the late Stanley Meyer figure out a way to run an internal combustion engine on pure water? And was he murdered because of the threat his invention posed to Big Oil?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Agenda 21

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Step out of the darkness"

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Who whistled then?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Stay calm, stay calm!"

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Something behind me!
